after_hours_flow_summary: For non-emergency calls outside of business hours, the agent will take a message and arrange for a callback during business hours.
non_emergency_routing_rules: For unsupported services like facility maintenance, do not transfer calls; inform the caller that the service is not provided.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours, the agent will assist with general inquiries, schedule pressure washing services, and immediately transfer emergency calls (chemical spills) to 403-870-8494.
questions_or_unknowns: Call transfer rules (failure message, retries, timeouts)
Specific handling for non-emergency calls during business hours if the primary contact is unavailable
